signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launched on Solana on April 17, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (wXRP) Launched on Solana on April 17, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Wrapped XRP went live on Solana via Hex Trust and LayerZero on April 17, 2026, enabling XRP holders to access Solana's DeFi ecosystem (yield farming, liquidity pools) without selling their tokens[1][2]. This bridge expands XRP utility into one of the fastest DeFi networks, driving a +5.15% price surge to $1.40 with

signals.headline: **Dec 10, 2025**: Powell stated Trump's tariffs caused **most** of the inflation overshoot above 2% target (PCE at 2
signals.raw: **Dec 10, 2025**: Powell stated Trump's tariffs caused **most** of the inflation overshoot above 2% target (PCE at 2.8%), while cutting rates 25bps to 3.5-3.75% amid cooling labor market and upside inflation risks.[2]
